schemaName={"object"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"type":"object","description":"[Circular reference to Company]"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} name={"maxTimePerQuestion"} qualifierMessage={"**Possible values:** [`draft`, `published`, `paused`]"} schema={{"type":"string","enum":["draft","published","paused"]}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false} collapsible={false} name={"date"} required={true} schemaName={"date-time"} qualifierMessage={undefined} schema={{"format":"date-time","type":"string"}}></SchemaItem><SchemaItem collapsible={false}
